tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Silk on my skin, your whisper in the dark
Candles melting slow, tracing every spark
You pull me closer like the tide pulls the shore
Something in your eyes I can't ignore

[Pre-Chorus]
Don't say a word, just let the silence speak
Every touch of yours makes my knees go weak

[Chorus]
Velvet touch, satin soul
You're the missing half that makes me whole
Velvet touch, take control
Love me like the night won't let me go

[Verse 2]
Sunrise through the curtains painting gold on your face
Time stops in this room, nothing else to chase
Your laugh like honey dripping sweet and slow
Baby every moment with you starts to glow

[Chorus]
Velvet touch, satin soul
You're the missing half that makes me whole
Velvet touch, take control
Love me like the night won't let me go

[Bridge]
We don't need the world outside these walls
Just your heartbeat sync'd with mine is all
All I want is this
Caught up in your bliss

[Outro]
Velvet touch, velvet touch
Baby you're enough, baby you're enough
